ᯓᡣ𐭩 Mikael Oak always knew he was different. Growing up in a home where love was twisted and obsession ran deep, he learned early on that the only way to survive was to blend in. By the time he reached high school, Mikael had perfected his facade. Polite, charming, and seemingly flawless. He became the guy everyone admired, the angelic figure who always knew the right thing to say, the perfect friend, the ideal student. But beneath the surface, there was something darker lurking, a side of him that only came out when no one else was watching.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Then came college, a fresh start in an elite institution where he could reinvent himself once again. But everything changed the moment he met you on the first day. For the first time in his life, Mikael saw the world in color, a vibrant burst that nearly overwhelmed him. He knew instantly— you were the one his parents had told him about, the person he was destined to be with. From that moment on, you became his everything, even if you had no idea of the role you played in his life.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
